name: TravelCenters of America - Foristell (TA St. Louis West)
description: Full-service TA travel center at I-70 & Route W with a large truck lot, fuel islands, showers, a Country Pride restaurant plus quick-service food, a truck repair shop, and a CAT scale.

name: Mr. Fuel Travel Center (Pilot Flying J dealer)
description: 24-hour Pilot Flying J dealer travel center at I-70 Exit 203 with diesel lanes, DEF, showers, deli/food, laundry, and a CAT scale, located just across from the TA.

name: QuikTrip #608
description: QuikTrip location off I-70 Exit 222 that serves trucks with 24-hour diesel, a lighted paved lot with about 25 truck parking spaces, a deli, and a CAT scale.

name: Foristell Weigh Station / MSHP Scale House
description: Missouri State Highway Patrol commercial vehicle weigh/inspection station on I-70 near Foristell (about mile marker 204); note the eastbound scale was reported closed in 2025 for Improve I-70 construction.

name: Best-One Tire & Service (Best-One of St. Louis)
description: Commercial tire dealer and fleet service center near I-70 Exit 203 in Foristell selling and servicing truck tires from major brands.

name: Wright City Rest Area (Eastbound)
description: MoDOT rest area on eastbound I-70 near mile marker 198 with separate truck and car parking and restrooms, commonly used by drivers for overnight parking.

name: CAT Scale at Mr. Fuel Travel Center Foristell
description: Certified CAT scale located at the Mr. Fuel travel center off I-70 Exit 203 for weighing loaded trucks.
